Enter the Realm

Download Ashen Throne

Free to play. Free to download. The Shattered Realm has been waiting long enough — and so have you.

Download for Windows Create Account First
v2.4.1  ·  Windows 10/11  ·  ~8.4 GB  ·  Free to Play
Get Started

Three Steps to the Throne

  1. 01

    Create Your Account

    Register on the Ashen Throne website. Choose your name wisely — it will outlive you in the Realm, or it will be forgotten in the ash.

  2. 02

    Download the Launcher

    The launcher handles installation, updates, and server selection automatically. Download it once — it handles the rest.

  3. 03

    Choose Your Class & Enter

    Select your class, choose a server, and enter the Shattered Realm. The first death is the easiest. Everything after that is a lesson.

Available On
Windows 10 / 11 macOS — Coming Soon
System Requirements
Minimum
ComponentRequired
OSWindows 10 64-bit (build 1903+)
CPUIntel Core i5-6600 / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
RAM8 GB
GPUNVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD RX 580
VRAM4 GB
Storage8.4 GB SSD
NetworkBroadband (5 Mbps+)
DirectXVersion 11
Recommended
ComponentRequired
OSWindows 11 64-bit
CPUIntel Core i7-8700K / AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
RAM16 GB
GPUNVIDIA RTX 3060 / AMD RX 6700 XT
VRAM8 GB
Storage8.4 GB NVMe SSD
NetworkBroadband (20 Mbps+)
DirectXVersion 12

Performance may vary. An SSD is strongly recommended for optimal load times in large-scale PvP encounters.

Common Questions

Before You Enter

Is Ashen Throne truly free?

Yes. The game and launcher are free to download and play. Optional cosmetic purchases exist in the in-game store, but all gameplay content is fully accessible without spending anything.

What regions are available?

Currently EU (Ashfeld), NA (Pyremark), and Asia-Pacific (Voidrift) servers are live. SEA and South American servers are in development for 2026.

Can I transfer servers?

Character server transfers are available once every 90 days. Your account, purchases, and cosmetics persist across all servers. Guild membership is region-locked.

Is the game pay-to-win?

No. The in-game store contains cosmetics, mounts, and character slots only. All weapons, armor, and abilities are obtained through gameplay. The Realm rewards skill and time — not spending.

Do I need an account to play?

Yes. A free Ironveil Studios account is required to log in. Creating one takes less than two minutes and gives you access to all servers and cross-platform features.

How large are updates?

Major chapter updates typically range from 1.5–4 GB. The launcher downloads patches in the background and applies them before your next session, so you never wait at a loading screen.

Ashen Throne

A dark fantasy MMORPG set in a shattered world. Forge alliances, conquer kingdoms, and claim the throne.
